name: DinoLife
short_description: Hatch Dinos! Upgrade your town! Buy a house! In DinoLife you hatch and tend to many Dinosaurs, upgrade your town and Dinosaur pens all while bettering your relationship with the residents and customising your personal spaces.
detailed_description:
DinoLife is a casual Dinosaur farming game with life-sim elements.

In DinoLife you hatch and tend to many Dinosaurs, upgrade your town and Dinosaur pens all while bettering your relationship with the residents and customising your personal spaces.

Features
  • Collect, hatch and earn money from different dinosaurs.
  • Attempt to hatch the most appealing dinosaurs to earn more money.
  • Feed your dinos.
  • Complete missions and interact with NPCs.
  • Become friends with NPCs.
  • Buy items to place within your house and even save to buy your own house.
